splash.seoTitle: Aurya — the home of holistic retreats is about to open
splash.seoDesc: Aurya gathers Italy’s holistic retreats in one curated place. We’re getting ready to launch: leave your email and be among the first.
splash.title: The home of holistic retreats
splash.subtitle: Discover the holistic retreat that best fits your path, or bring yours to Aurya. We believe every journey of transformation begins when the right people meet the right place. That’s why we created a space where people, practitioners and venues come together.
splash.travelerText: Tell us what calls to you, and at launch you'll receive retreats chosen for you.
splash.operatorText: Bring your retreats to Aurya: the first on board start as founders.
splash.peek: Take a peek at the retreats preview

banner.title: We're getting ready to launch.
banner.body: These are sample retreats: soon you'll find the real ones here, bookable online.

form.name: Your name
form.trCity: Where do you live? City or area
form.interestsLabel: What calls to you? Feel free to pick more than one path
form.budgetLabel: How much would you like to invest in a retreat?
form.description: Tell us about your work in a couple of lines: what you offer, since when, and for whom.
form.consent: I agree to be contacted by email about the launch of Aurya.
form.ctaOp: I want to be there at launch
form.thanksTr: At launch you'll receive a selection of retreats chosen just for you. See you soon.
form.thanksOp: Thank you for introducing yourself: we'll write to you personally before launch.
form.travelLabel: Where do you picture your retreat?

travel.near: Close to home, in my area

form.venueTypeLabel: What kind of venue are you?

op.seoTitle: Aurya for practitioners — you create the experience, we help people find it
op.seoDesc: Aurya is about to open: Italy’s meeting place for authentic wellbeing. The right people find you, book with a deposit and direct online payment, and you get back to taking care of them. The first practitioners on board start as founders.
op.eyebrow: For those who create wellbeing experiences
op.title: You create the experience. We help people find it.
op.subtitle: You've built something precious: a place, a practice, a community. You deserve to be found by the people who are looking for it, without chasing algorithms. Aurya is about to open: the Italian meeting place for authentic wellbeing.
op.photoCaption: “The most beautiful work in the world deserves to be seen.”
op.foundersT: The first on board start as founders.
op.foundersB: We'll get back to you personally before launch. No call centers, no spam.
op.formTitle: Introduce yourself: let's get to know each other
op.formBody: A couple of lines about you and your work. It's the start of a conversation, not a form.
op.visionT: Not just another listing. An ecosystem that works for you.
op.visionB: A profile that tells your story, retreats that get found, bookings that arrive already confirmed, real reviews that build your reputation. Every part supports the others — as in any holistic practice worthy of the name.
op.b1b: Your profile tells who you are, your place and your practice — and it appears to those searching for exactly that, in your area. Without chasing algorithms.
op.b2b: Whoever signs up pays a deposit and pays directly online; reminders go out on their own. Those who book actually show up: empty spots stop being the hidden cost of your work.
op.b3t: Your time goes back to the people
op.b3b: Calendar, participants, verified reviews and earnings live in one place, in harmony. The hours lost between messages and spreadsheets go back to the people you guide.
op.foundersTitle: Those who sow first, harvest first
op.f1: Front-row visibility at launch, when everyone will be watching
op.f2: Personal guidance as you build your profile
op.f3: Conditions reserved for those here from the start, forever

tr.seoTitle: Aurya — there's a retreat out there waiting for you
tr.seoDesc: Aurya is about to open: real holistic retreats from verified practitioners, with a deposit and direct online payment. Tell us what you're looking for, and at launch we'll suggest retreats chosen for you.
tr.eyebrow: For those who feel the need to pause
tr.title: There's a retreat out there waiting for you
tr.subtitle: The silence of an olive grove, a circle of real people, your breath slowing down again. Aurya is about to open: tell us what you're looking for and we'll help you find it.
tr.stepsTitle: Not another portal. Someone walking beside you.
tr.s1t: Tell us what you're looking for
tr.s1b: Where you live, what calls to you, how far you'd like to go. Thirty seconds, no strings attached.
tr.s2t: Receive a selection chosen just for you
tr.s2b: At launch we won't send you a catalog: we'll suggest the retreats that are right for you, picked by hand.
tr.s3b: You secure your spot with a small deposit and pay directly online, with clear rules. The rest is the journey.
tr.formTitle: Tell us what you're looking for
tr.formBody: Thirty seconds is all it takes. Tell us where you live and what calls to you, and at launch you'll receive a selection of retreats chosen just for you. No avalanche of emails: only what matters.
tr.peek: Sneak a peek at the retreats preview
tr.b1b: Behind every retreat there's a practitioner with a face, a real place, and reviews from people who've actually been there. You know who you're entrusting yourself to, before you go.
tr.b2t: Your spot is yours, no worries
tr.b2b: A small deposit to secure your spot, direct online payment, the balance later on. No wiring money into the unknown, no surprises.
tr.b3b: Tell us where you live and we'll suggest experiences within easy reach. Sometimes the journey you need is an hour from home.
tr.why: Aurya was born from a simple belief: taking care of yourself shouldn't take hours of digging through social pages and word of mouth. One single, carefully curated place to find the people who do this work with heart.
